title: ADEPTNA Giant High Density EVA Foam Noughts & Crosses Indoor and Outdoor Garden Game Mat – Water Resistant and Non-Toxic
features: FANTASTIC SKILL GAME - A fantastic skill test for people of all ages to enjoy. Giant Noughts & Crosses classic game is ideal for playing in the garden or while on vacation. Interlocking edges make it so simple to assemble
FUN GAME FOR HOURS - Noughts and Crosses is a fun way to spend a few hours in the yard on a warm summer evening, and it's ideal for both adults and children.
PERFECT FOR SOCIAL GATHERINGS - Our popular outdoor game is ideal for social gatherings with friends and family, as well as events and festivities parties. Easy clean with a damp cloth and mild soap.
HIGH DENSITY EVA FOAM - Made from high density EVA foam, the thick premium tiles comfortably cushion children spine, hips, knees and elbows on hard surfaces.

APPROX. DIMENSIONS - 9 interlocking squares and each size 32cm x 32cm x 0.9cm , 5 noughts each size 21cm diameter x 1cm , 5 crosses each size 23cm x 23cm x 0.9cm. Suitable for 2 or more players. Suitable for ages 3+
